description: Search the Locus plugin registries by natural-language query, plugin id, name, summary, author, or tag. By default it searches every registry the user has registered in the Locus plugin hub. Use this when the /plugin request asks to find, discover, compare, or install a plugin but the exact registry id is not already confirmed.

query.description: Search text from the user's natural-language /plugin request, such as a capability, plugin name, tag, author, or exact plugin id.

registryBaseUrl.description: Optional registry base URL override that narrows the search to one registry. Omit to search all registries configured in Locus; the official Locus registry is used when none are configured.

limit.description: Maximum result count, clamped to 1-50. Default is 20.
